description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design with large windows and a spacious layout. The front facade is accented by a wide porch with columns, leading to a double-door entrance and a paved driveway to the attached garage. The rear of the bungalow opens onto an expansive wooden deck, complete with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and lush landscaping including palm trees and a large central tree. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, with horizontal railings and minimalist detailing. Multiple large windows provide ample natural light and views of the outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a wide porch, attached garage, large windows, and a spacious deck featuring a pool and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, double-door entrance, attached garage, and landscaped driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the extension of the deck with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, sun loungers, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, deck, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
